lines.speaker: Lord Marshal Brogan
lines.text: This and that... But mostly, I'm looking for a good place to mobilise my army.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's awfully specific, you sure this is a good place for it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure there's enough land, to be honest.

lines.speaker: Lord Marshal Brogan
lines.text: Tish tosh! I'm importing sand from Al Kharid, there'll be a base camp here in no time, do not fret!
